PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Basil Boutris appeared by zoom for Michelle Pierce.

Mr. Boutris stated that two properties were sold, that one property still belongs to the estate, that they filed a tax return recently to report the gain on the sales and that the estate is pretty close to having a petition for final distribution. Mr. Boutris also stated that he is really waiting for the IRS and the FTB to get back to him regarding any potential interest that may apply and that there are not going to be any waivers of accountings. In addition, Mr. Boutris stated that he does not think the accountings will be very complicated because the properties were held by the family, that the properties were not rented out and requested a 90-day continuance. Discussion was held regarding how far back the accountings will go. The Report on Status of Administration is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition. Status on close of estate is set for May 9, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.
